title.en: LONDY Colorful Dreamer 168-Piece Glow Fort Building Kit Added
title.zh: LONDY Colorful Dreamer 168件发光堡垒套装上新

excerpt.en: The Colorful Dreamer 168-piece glow fort kit is now available for retail, gift, and themed building-toy project review.
excerpt.zh: Colorful Dreamer 168件发光堡垒套装已加入产品线，适合礼品、零售和主题拼搭玩具项目评估。

body.en:
The LONDY Colorful Dreamer 168-piece glow fort building kit has been added to the product line for retail, gift, and OEM/ODM project discussion.

The set is built around pink rotating balls, standard rods, glow rods, clips, rings, a storage bag, and a flag. It is designed for indoor building scenes with a stronger visual theme.

A clear 168-piece configuration for channel planning

The product file records 50 pink rotating balls, 70 pink standard rods, 16 glow rods at 40 cm, and 14 glow rods at 58 cm. The clear piece mix helps customers review price band, package size, and age positioning.

For sourcing teams, a confirmed configuration is more useful than a single product image. It helps decide whether the set fits online bundles, seasonal gifts, or retail shelf display.

Glow parts make the play easier to remember

Glow rods separate this SKU from a standard fort building set. Children can build the frame during the day and continue role-play at night around tents, hideouts, or adventure scenes.

That theme also gives customers more material for packaging artwork and listing images, especially for channels that need a stronger visual hook.

Ready for sample and packaging discussion

The current direction uses color box packing. The reference color box size is 43 x 31 x 11.5 cm, with outer carton information of 60 x 45 x 33 cm / 5 boxes. Artwork, language version, and order details can be confirmed during the sample stage.

Related product

The LONDY Colorful Dreamer 168-piece glow fort kit product page includes key configuration and packaging information for buyer review.

View product details

A Colorful Theme Fits Gift And Home-Play Scenes

The value of Colorful Dreamer is its brighter visual direction, which fits kids gifts, birthday scenes, and family activities. A 168-piece configuration creates a meaningful build size without the package pressure of an extra-large kit.

For channel launches, LONDY Colorful Dreamer 168-Piece Glow Fort Building Kit can work as a mid-to-high configuration theme item for creative building, screen-free play, parent-child activity, and early STEM play.

Packaging And Listings Should Show The Play In Use

What to showWhat customers understandProject preparation
Parts layoutPiece count, color, and accessories are clearPhoto list, configuration table
Finished structureBuild size and child-sized spaceBasic shapes, instruction steps
Home useGift value and parent-child playLifestyle images, age guidance

This product should not rely only on box photos. Showing how children build, adjust, and keep playing makes the listing more convincing.

A Theme Item For Product Series

Yaoshun can review 168-piece configurations, glow themes, color boxes, and instruction customization. Customers can view the product page and submit brand-packaging needs through www.yaoshuntoys.com/contact.

View Colorful DreamerView More KitsAsk For Samples
body.zh:
LONDY Colorful Dreamer 168件发光堡垒套装已完成产品资料整理，可供客户进行零售、礼品和 OEM/ODM 项目评估。

这款产品以粉色旋转球、标准杆和夜光杆为核心配置，配套夹子、套圈、收纳袋和旗子，适合打造更有氛围感的儿童室内搭建场景。

168件配置便于渠道规划

产品资料记录了 50个粉色旋转球、70根粉色标准杆、16根 40cm 夜光杆和14根 58cm 夜光杆。件数组合清晰，方便客户评估价格带、包装体积和目标年龄段。

对于项目团队来说，清楚的配置比单纯展示图片更重要。它能帮助客户更快判断产品是否适合线上套装、节日礼品或门店陈列。

夜光元素让玩法更有记忆点

发光杆件让这款套装与普通堡垒拼搭产品形成区分。孩子可以在白天完成结构搭建，晚上继续围绕帐篷、秘密基地或探险场景进行角色扮演。

这种主题感也方便客户做包装画面和产品页面设计，尤其适合需要更强视觉卖点的渠道。

可进入样品和包装沟通

当前产品采用彩盒包装方向，参考彩盒尺寸为 43 x 31 x 11.5 cm，外箱信息为 60 x 45 x 33 cm / 5盒。具体包装画面、语言版本和订单要求，可在样品阶段进一步确认。

关联产品

LONDY Colorful Dreamer 168件发光堡垒拼搭套装已在产品页整理关键参数，便于客户进一步查看配置和包装信息。

查看产品详情

彩色主题更适合礼品和家庭场景

Colorful Dreamer 的价值在于视觉更轻快，适合儿童礼物、生日场景和家庭亲子活动。168件配置能搭出有规模感的结构，又不会像超大套装那样带来过高包装压力。

对于渠道上新，LONDY Colorful Dreamer 168件发光堡垒拼搭套装 可以作为中高配置主题款，承接“创意拼搭、屏幕外玩具、亲子互动、STEM 启蒙”等自然使用需求。

页面和包装要展示“玩起来”的样子

展示内容消费者会理解什么项目准备
零件平铺件数、颜色和配件一眼清楚拍摄清单、配置表
完成结构能搭多大、孩子如何进入基础造型、说明书步骤
家庭使用适合礼物和亲子陪伴生活场景图、年龄建议

这类产品不适合只拍盒子。越能展示孩子如何搭、如何改、如何继续玩，详情页越有说服力。

可作为系列中的主题款

尧顺可围绕 168件、夜光主题、彩盒和说明书做项目评估。客户可查看产品页，并通过 www.yaoshuntoys.com/zh/contact 提交品牌包装需求。

查看Colorful Dreamer查看更多套装咨询样品
